summary: Investing sounds simple. Start early, invest regularly, diversify, review, be patient. But if it’s so simple, why do so many people still fail to create wealth? In this episode of This or That with Bhartendra, I sit down with Mohit Bhatia, CEO of Bank of India Mutual Fund(ex–Franklin Templeton, DSP, Axis Bank, Canara Robeco), to break down why investing is simple but not easy – and what actually works for Indian investors.

chapters.label: The 3 Real Edges: Information, Analysis & Behaviour
Asset Allocation vs Diversification vs Timing (F1 Engine Analogy)
SIP Myths: Frequency vs Category – What Really Matters
Right Diversification: Domestic, Global, Gold & Real Estate
Mid & Small Caps in a “Viksit Bharat” Portfolio

tool.label: The Fork Test
tool.reason: Meet your money archetype in nine taps, then see which habits to lean into and which to drop.
